title: FTS4 integrity-check fails for UTF16 encoding
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t0 USING fts4;
key_bug_features: FTS4 integrity-check fails with UTF16 encoding
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t1 USING fts4(content TEXT, id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM t1);
